channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Hate giving blood? Samsung’s latest VR demo will help you meditate while donating — and it’s given me some ideas
item.description: Samsung’s XR headset might help you relax the next time you give blood, thanks to VR meditation.

item.title: Here are 21 new features in iOS 27 that Apple didn't have time to mention during its WWDC 2026 keynote
item.description: iOS 27 is going to bring more updates than you might think when it starts rolling out in a few months.
